title: Szombathely, Vas — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Szombathely, Vas: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Szombathely is a city in Vas with a population of 78,884. Hungary’s oldest recorded city, founded by the Romans as Savaria, with well-preserved Roman ruins, a charming main square, and a vibrant cultural scene.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
